debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
f : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n → ℝ
fc : ContDiff ℝ 2 f
x y : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n
ε : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
hdiff : failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)
mpb : mixed_partials_bounded f x
g₀ : ℝ → GlobalTheorem.E✝ n := GlobalTheorem.interpolator✝ n x y
g : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated✝ n x y f
g' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv✝ n x y f
g'' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv2✝ n x y f
f_diff : Differentiable ℝ f
g₀_diff : Differentiable ℝ g₀
g_diff : Differentiable ℝ g
⊢ Differentiable ℝ g'

failed_attempts:
have : ContDiff ℝ 1 f := fc.contDiff_succ.contDiff_of_le (by norm_num)
    have : ∀ i, Differentiable ℝ (nth_partial i f) := fun i ↦ (this.differentiable (by norm_num))
    apply Differentiable.sum
    intro i _
    apply Differentiable.mul
    · exact differentiable_const
    · apply (this i).comp
      exact Differentiable.add
        (Differentiable.const_smul (by norm_num) g₀_diff)
        (Differentiable.const_smul (by norm_num) g₀_diff)

have h1 : ContDiff ℝ 1 f := fc.contDiff_succ.contDiff_of_le (by norm_num)
    have h2 : ContDiff ℝ 1 (fun p : E n => nth_partial i f p) := by
      apply contDiff_nth_partial
      exact h1
    apply differentiable_sum
    intro i _
    apply differentiable_mul
    · exact differentiable_const
    · apply (h2.differentiable (by norm_num)).comp
      exact Differentiable.interpolator x y

have : ContDiff ℝ 1 (interpolated_deriv x y f) := by
      apply contDiff_sum
      intro i _
      apply ContDiff.mul
      · exact contDiff_const
      · apply (ContDiff.comp (fc.partial i).contDiff)
        exact contDiff_add (contDiff_const.const_mul _) (contDiff_id.const_mul _)
    exact this.differentiable (by norm_num)

have : ContDiff ℝ 1 f := fc.contDiff_succ.mp (by norm_num)
